Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2025

Information We Collect

  • Analytics data: Anonymous page view data
  • Cookies: For analytics and affiliate tracking

How We Use Your Information

  • To improve our website and deals
  • To track affiliate referrals (no personal data shared with partners)

Third-Party Services

  • Affiliate networks: May set cookies to track referrals
  • Analytics: Anonymous site usage
